blocks.content: He stepped aside. Not satisfied — just done.
Daniel walked off. Larry kept moving. He was nearly to third period when Jonathan fell into step beside him.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Yo — you see that kid Daniel?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: He was watching you walk by. I caught it.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aight. Just saying — don't let him think you're somebody he can play with. First impressions stick.

blocks.prompt: What does Larry say to Jonathan?

options.label: "I didn't say anything. Maybe I should have."
